dashboard.label: DharmaGate: Sovereign Fleet Autonomy
dashboard.description: Real-time autonomous oversight dashboard for the RadhikaChain sovereign validator fleet. Neon cyberpunk HUD-style interface for hackathon demonstration.

search.query: index=krittika_consensus sourcetype=krittika:consensus | stats avg(karma_score) as avg_karma stdev(karma_score) as sigma_karma by validator_id | rangemap field=avg_karma low=0-70 elevated=71-90 default=severe
index=krittika_audit sourcetype=krittika:audit | sort - _time | table _time, intent, action, status, current_hash | head 20
index=krittika_network sourcetype=krittika:ebpf | timechart span=1m avg(network_latency_ms) as latency by src_ip | where latency > 0

index=krittika_consensus sourcetype=krittika:consensus | stats latest(latency_ms) as latency_ms latest(karma_score) as karma_score latest(block_height) as block_height by validator_id | eval health=case(latency_ms < 100, "HEALTHY", latency_ms < 500, "DEGRADED", latency_ms < 1000, "CRITICAL", true(), "OFFLINE") | sort - latency_ms
index=krittika_metrics sourcetype=krittika:container | timechart span=1m avg(cpu_percent) as avg_cpu max(mem_percent) as max_mem by container_name | where avg_cpu > 50 OR max_mem > 70

index=krittika_audit sourcetype=krittika:audit | streamstats current=f last(current_hash) as expected_prev_hash | eval chain_valid=if(isnull(expected_prev_hash), "GENESIS", if(expected_prev_hash==prev_hash, "VALID", "BROKEN")) | stats count as total count(eval(chain_valid=="VALID" OR chain_valid=="GENESIS")) as valid count(eval(chain_valid=="BROKEN")) as broken | eval integrity_pct=round((valid/total)*100,2) | table integrity_pct total valid broken
